text:
is an organization that appears in Rebuild of Evangelion film series. It deals with the Evangelion production and management as according to the IPEA in Europe. One of its bases is located in Paris, France, a facility that contains numerous equipment that was guarded by numerous autonomous Evangelion Mark.44A, Evangelion Mark.44B and one Evangelion Mark.4444C. It was raided by WILLE with Evangelion Production Model Custom Type-08 β-ICC fighting against it as WILLE, soldiers could use the sealing pillars to decontaminate the base and regain control of it and its contents.

EURO-NERV Germany

Construction of Evangelion Unit-02
